title: Sim card release mechanism with sma actuator
abstract: A mechanism for releasing a SIM card locked into an electronic device by a spring-loaded mechanical restraint (4, 5) includes a SIM card holder comprising a rectangular frame (1), a SMA wire actuator (10) mounted on said frame (1) so as to deform it upon activation in order to release said mechanical restraint (4, 5), and springs (8) for the ejection of the SIM card holder upon release of the mechanical restraint.
claims: Claims 1. A mechanism for releasing a SIM card locked into an electronic device, said mechanism including: - a SIM card holder comprising a substantially rectangular frame (1) made up of an external cover (la) that closes an access opening formed in a device case (2), two legs (lb) extending orthogonally from said external cover (la) into said device case (2) and an internal side (lc) orthogonally connecting said two legs (lb), said holder defining a SIM card receiving space, SCRS, located adjacent to the external cover (la); - a mechanical restraint that keeps the SIM card holder locked inside the device such that the external cover (la) is flush with the external surface of the device case (2); - a shape memory alloy actuating element, preferably in the form of a shape memory alloy wire (10), that upon activation releases said mechanical restraint; - elastic means for the ejection of the SIM card holder upon release of the mechanical restraint; characterized in that - said mechanical restraint is spring-loaded; - said internal side (lc) of the holder frame (1) has at least one spring-like flexible portion (9) that allows a longitudinal contraction of said internal side (lc); - the shape memory alloy actuating element extends between the two legs (lb) of the holder frame (1), preferably orthogonally thereto; - the SIM card receiving space, SCRS, is extended along the two legs (lb), either in the length direction or in the thickness direction, such that a SIM card fitted therein does not prevent said longitudinal contraction of the internal side (lc); and in that said mechanism further includes - two conductive pads (11) arranged adjacent to the access opening of the device case (2); and - two conductive strips (12) arranged on the holder frame (1) along the two legs (lb) respectively, said conductive strips (12) extending between the ends of the shape memory alloy actuating element and the end portions of the external cover (la) at a position in correspondence with said conductive pads (11). 2. A mechanism according to claim 1, characterized in that the SIM card receiving space, SCRS, is extended along the two legs (lb) in the length direction so as to take up only a fraction of their length, said fraction preferably being about a half of their length. 3. A mechanism according to claim 1, characterized in that the SIM card receiving space, SCRS, is extended along substantially the whole length of the two legs (lb) but on a different plane in the thickness direction. 4. A mechanism according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the spring-loaded mechanical restraint consists of a pair of opposite locking pins (4) that are pushed by relevant springs (5) into engagement with the end portions of the legs (lb), preferably orthogonally thereto, where correspondingly shaped seats (6) are formed, the engagement position of said locking pins (4) being defined by end stops (7) formed on the device case (2). 5. A mechanism according to claim 4, characterized in that the shape memory alloy actuating element is located in correspondence with the seats (6) formed in the end portions of the legs (lb). 6. A mechanism according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the elastic means for the ejection of the SIM card holder consist of a pair of ejection springs (8) aligned with the legs (lb). 7. A mechanism according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the shape memory alloy actuating element is connected and sealed to the SIM card holder by a flexible glue which allows a 2% contraction. 8. A mechanism according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that a gasket (3) is provided close to the ends of said access opening and externally with respect to the conductive pads (11), said gasket (3) being suitable to prevent, in cooperation with the external cover (la), the passage of any undesired substance through the access opening.
